lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

Get ready for your next adventure with this dependable vehicle! While it shows some honest signs of wear and tear and has plenty of character from its time on the road, it remains a reliable choice for anyone looking for great value. It's in fair condition and ready to serve its next owner well!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of significant wear. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show visible signs of wear and aging. The mechanical and electrical systems are currently operational but may need attention soon.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, representing the pinnacle of care and maintenance. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single scratch, dent, or stone chip. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with leather upholstery that looks and smells brand new and all electronic features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships with a full record of preventative maintenance. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. For a buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, this is the perfect example.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The engine currently has a noticeable knock and the transmission slips when shifting into second gear. On the exterior, there is visible rust on the rocker panels and a large dent in the rear passenger door. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project car or for parts.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail and exhaustive maintenance protocols. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute gem. It’s honestly in pristine condition—looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. I'm so excited for someone to take this beauty home!

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine, concours-level condition. Power is delivered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring high-pressure Double-VANOS and six individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. This example features the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein B16
Pristine condition. Flawless paint and interior. Garage kept. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and consistently stored in a climate-controlled garage. Step inside to find an interior that remains factory-fresh; the premium leather seats show absolutely no bolster wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history from certified technicians and exceptionally low mileage. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of this model, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-level integrity, both mechanically and aesthetically. For the discerning collector seeking a vehicle in truly superlative condition, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire excellence without compromise.

We are proud to present this superlative example, maintained in impeccable condition and representing the highest standard of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a level of preservation that will satisfy even the most fastidious collector, featuring an interior and exterior that remain virtually indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in seriously incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every maintenance schedule. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. It’s ready for a new home where it'll be just as loved. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered in concours condition, this E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S65 4.0L V8 remains a mechanical masterpiece, featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system that pulls cleanly to its 8,400 RPM redline. This example boasts a factory-correct subframe and an impeccable maintenance record, ensuring the M-Variable differential and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) operate with surgical precision. The chassis rigidity is preserved by the original carbon fiber roof, while the M-DCT dual-clutch transmission delivers lightning-fast shifts. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking peak BMW M performance.
Mint condition. Flawless paint and interior. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Low mileage. Fully serviced.

This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, meticulously maintained to preserve its original factory luster. The exterior features a flawless finish with no dings, chips, or scratches, while the interior remains pristine with supple, untouched leather and zero signs of wear on the touchpoints. Every component, from the responsive engine to the sophisticated infotainment system, functions perfectly. Complete with a comprehensive service history and kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a like-new masterpiece that drives as smoothly as the day it was first commissioned.

We are pleased to present this exceptional motorcar, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, having been maintained to an uncompromising standard that ensures both mechanical perfection and aesthetic flawlessness. For the discerning buyer who demands peerless quality and an investment-grade acquisition, this specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience without compromise.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle occupies a category of its own, maintained to the most exacting standards to ensure it remains in showroom-grade condition. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component reflects a legacy of meticulous preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. For the discerning buyer who prioritizes absolute integrity and pristine presentation, this offering represents the pinnacle of pre-owned luxury and reliability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? You’ve found it! This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy, kept in pristine condition and pampered since day one. It’s seriously flawless—no scratches, no spills, just pure driving bliss. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy this gem as much as I have!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S is a superlative example of the 996.2 wide-body aesthetic, engineered for the discerning purist. Powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six with a reinforced IMS bearing and dry-sump lubrication, the powertrain exhibits flawless compression and leak-down figures. The short-throw Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides surgical gear selection, driving an all-wheel-drive system that maintains perfect torque vectoring. Performance is anchored by an immaculate suspension geometry featuring factory-spec Bilstein dampers and Brembo four-piston monoblock calipers
Mint condition. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Garage kept. Full service history included.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved, boasting a flawless exterior finish with a deep, mirror-like luster and an interior that remains in absolute pristine condition. Every surface, from the premium hand-stitched leather upholstery to the high-gloss trim, is free of any blemishes or signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It drives with the same precision and smoothness as the day it was manufactured. Complete with all original documentation and a spotless history, this is a rare find for a buyer who accepts only the absolute best.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a showroom-quality interior, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically impeccable and aesthetically superior, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Available for immediate acquisition.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, it presents in showroom-grade condition with flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical integrity. An investment-quality acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! 🚗 Check out this absolute beauty! I’ve babied this car since day one, and honestly, it’s in showroom condition. It drives like a dream and looks virtually brand new inside and out. If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and kept in top-notch shape, this is definitely the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Presenting an investment-grade performance icon in a condition that challenges its factory delivery state. This high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant features razor
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and shows absolutely no signs of wear. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been protected with a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all service records documented and organized. It drives as tightly and smoothly as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece that requires nothing but a new garage to call home. Includes both sets of original keys, all owner's manuals, and a clean title.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, preserved in showroom condition with uncompromising attention to detail. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. For the discerning individual who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in quality and performance.
